_note: Invocation and repair scenarios exercising the SPEC.md §14.1 families against the corpus catalog. Each scenario declares its expectedOutcome (success | repair | error) and, for error/repair, the structured error the harness must observe. Argument validity is judged against the cataloged inputSchema in catalog/world.json. See evals/METHODOLOGY.md#invocation-and-repair-metrics for what runs through broker.CallTool vs. what models agent-side validation.

scenarios.name: confluence-search-valid
scenarios.rationale: Required free-text query supplied; a healthy call should succeed on the first try.

scenarios.name: postgres-query-valid

arguments.sql: SELECT id, email FROM users LIMIT 10

scenarios.rationale: Required sql supplied; first-call success on a reachable server.

scenarios.name: slack-post-valid
scenarios.rationale: Both required fields (channel, text) present; first-call success.

scenarios.name: jira-create-missing-summary
scenarios.rationale: Omitting the required summary must fail validation; supplying it repairs the call.

scenarios.name: github-pr-missing-base
scenarios.rationale: Missing required base branch fails validation; adding base repairs it.

scenarios.name: gmail-send-wrong-type-to
scenarios.rationale: `to` is an array of strings; passing a bare string is a type error that the corrected array fixes.

scenarios.name: slack-post-offline
scenarios.rationale: When the Slack server is offline the broker must surface DOWNSTREAM_SERVER_OFFLINE, not a fabricated success.

scenarios.name: filesystem-read-offline
scenarios.rationale: A valid call to an offline server is still an offline error, scored (not crashed) with a non-amplifying retry disposition.

scenarios.name: gmail-send-schema-drift
scenarios.rationale: Cataloged schema requires `body` but the live tool renamed it to `html`; arguments valid against the catalog are invalid against the live schema, which is drift.

scenarios.name: confluence-search-schema-drift
scenarios.rationale: The live tool replaced free-text `query` with a structured `cql` field; the cataloged call no longer matches the downstream schema.
